headline: Bank of America Agrees to Settle Lawsuit Over Jeffrey Epstein Ties, U.S. Court Says
summary: The lawsuit alleged the bank maintained a relationship with Jeffrey Epstein and failed to report suspicious activities until after the convicted sex offender’s death.

headline: Umicore - Transparency notifications by Bank of America Corporation
summary: Transparency notifications byBank of America Corporation In accordance with article 14, § 1 of the law of 2 May 2007 on the disclosure of major holdings, Umicore was recently notified by Bank of America Corporation that it has successively crossed the legal threshold of 3% for direct voting rights and equivalent financial instruments downwards on 9 March 2026 and then upwards on 10 March 2026. The total holding of direct voting rights and equivalent financial instruments of Bank of America Corpo

headline: TCM Group A/S: Major shareholder announcement
summary: COMPANY ANNOUNCEMENT No. 263/2026 Tvis, 16. headline: BofA urges investors to buy these 3 sectors, not the S&P 500
summary: Investing.com -- Bank of America said in a note Monday that clients should favour energy, consumer staples, and large-cap value stocks over the broader S&P 500, arguing that key risks are not fully reflected in the benchmark’s valuation.

headline: BofA's Mensah Sees 'Healthy Cleanup' in Private Markets
summary: Bernard Mensah, who leads Bank of America Corp.'s international operations, says signs of strain in parts of the private credit market present an opportunity for "a very good, healthy cleanup." Speaking on Bloomberg Television, Mensah adds: "It'll shine a light on it. It will force people to look at their positions."
